_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 06:07 UTC tick — 1 unconsumed event (GOLD level_enter gold_escalation_buy_zone 4781.94 at 06:04). SKIPPED: zone swept (day low 4777 < zone bottom 4780), gold -0.79% day on USD bounce (DXY stronger limiting safe-haven bid), no M15 bull BOS confirmation available (bar_close close/high/low payloads are None). Web reality-check Apr 21 tick: Gold ~$4800 mild negative bias; ceasefire expires TODAY (Apr 21 per European Biz Mag/ABC, NOT Apr 22); Vance+Kushner+Witkoff flying Islamabad today (Iran 'no talks under threats' but supreme leader last-minute cleared delegates); US Navy seized Iranian vessel weekend. Market currently pricing DEAL OPTIMISM (gold weak, USD up) — classic pre-binary compression. Alerts on audusd (short on risk-off) and usdjpy (short on risk-off) carry STALE 'STRENGTHENING/RATIFIED' language from earlier ticks — price action today contradicts (risk-on posture). Updated audusd+usdjpy notes to reflect current mixed read. Gold alert kept (binary resolves 24h), note refreshed to reflect sweep + wait for BOS. 3 alerts MODIFIED (gold/audusd/usdjpy), 2 KEEP (oil/usdcad). Structure_watch KEEP 9, news queries KEEP 8.

Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 2 (was 3 — catalyst not ratifying on Tue).
